items.description: This repository contains input files and code for a two-stage machine learning framework used to predict FOAs.

items.name: AIP-G-1.0
items.description: The AIP-G 1.0 (Alzheimer’s disease, Inhibitor Predictor for GSK-3β, version 1.0) pipeline implements a two-stage machine learning framework for predicting GSK-3β inhibitors for Alzheimer’s disease.

items.name: ML_OFDM_PROJECT
items.description: The performance of different machine learning frameworks, like the support vector machine (SVM), random forest, gradient descent, and decision tree, is implemented to enhance the performance of the OFDM system model. The project can give effective performance concerning the machine learning model for different numbers of pilots and lengths of CPs.

items.name: LightGBM

items.description: A framework for motion planning using generative machine learning methods

items.name: explainable-ai-framework
items.description: Tools and methodologies for interpreting and explaining machine learning model predictions using LIME and SHAP.

items.name: miglioratore-audio
items.description: AudioOptimizer Pro è un framework enterprise progettato per l'ottimizzazione massiva di asset sonori. Sviluppato per podcasting, game design e dataset per il Machine Learning, questo tool automatizza la complessa catena di segnale (DSP) necessaria per trasformare registrazioni grezze in prodotti audio professionali e cristallini.

items.name: Hybrid-Deep-Learning-Framework-for-Smartphone-Addiction-Risk-Prediction
items.description: Smartphone addiction is a major behavioral health issue today, contributing to anxiety, sleep disturbance, and loss of productivity. This work proposes an astute and privacy-preserving method to smartphone addiction risk prediction and control using cutting-edge machine learning and deep learning methods

items.description: Global machine learning glacier mass balance framework, capable of assimilating all sources of glaciological and remote sensing data

items.name: MLJ.jl

items.name: GreenLens
items.description: GreenLens is an iOS application that uses on-device machine learning to analyze land through the camera and estimate carbon credit value. Built with SwiftUI and Apple’s Vision framework, it performs low-latency inference without relying on cloud services.

items.name: amiteshks
items.description: This repository serves as a hub for my ML/AI explorations, implementations, and tutorials. It includes:  🔍 Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) projects 🏗️ Machine Learning models for predictions and classifications 🤖 Deep Learning projects using frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Hugging Face 📜 Natural Language Processing (NLP) applications �

items.name: Hydro-Arid-Intelligence-Framework-for-Wadi-Water-Harvesting-Groundwater-Dynamics

items.name: Digital-Twin-Framework-for-Industrial-Asset-Prognostics
items.description: This project is a Digital Twin–based predictive maintenance system that uses sensor data and machine learning to estimate the Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of industrial equipment. By forecasting failures before they occur, the system enables proactive maintenance scheduling, reducing downtime, costs, and operational risks.

items.name: Agentic_AI-finrobot_machine_learning
items.description: A multi-agent financial analysis framework leveraging LLM-powered agents for macroeconomic insights, company evaluation, and portfolio decision-making. Features a three-layer architecture, API-integrated data pipelines, and an interactive Streamlit frontend.

items.description: Comparative framework for healthcare AI reasoning using machine learning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and in-context learning (ICL). Evaluates accuracy, robustness, and knowledge drift to support reliable, interpretable decision-making in clinical settings.

items.description: 9‑class wafer defect classification + per‑class anomaly detection. EfficientNetV2 with coordinate channels, two‑phase training, ONNX + ONNX Runtime verification (max diff < 1e‑4), PCA + Isolation Forest, SQLite storage.

items.description: Iris Machine Learning Project to learn the basics of Data Visualization, EDA, Machine Learning and different classifiers. SeaBorn and Matplotlib Frame word will be used for data visualization and Scikit Learn Framework will be used for the Machine Learning part.

items.name: Donation-forecasting-research
items.description: This research aims to develop and compare multiple time-series machine learning models to predict future donation trends for community food assistance programs. The core contribution is an anomaly-aware, multivariate forecasting framework that not only predicts donation volume but specifically identifies upcoming donation drought periods

items.name: C-ML

items.name: DpointTrader_deeplearning
items.description: This repository is a machine learning and deep learning research framework for A-share basket stock selection, covering the full workflow from data loading and feature engineering to time-aware validation, model training, portfolio construction, backtesting, and reporting.这是一个面向 A 股篮子选股的机器学习与深度学习研究框架，覆盖数据加载、特征工程、时间切分、模型训练、组合构建、回测评估和报告导出的完整流程。

items.name: warp_tension
items.description: This repository, provides a comprehensive framework for analyzing and predicting yarn behavior in textile weaving using machine learning. The project bridges the gap between traditional textile manufacturing and data-driven optimization by focusing on the relationship between yarn parameters and loom performance.

items.name: OpenPQD-Synthetic-Power-Quality-Dataset-Analysis-Toolkit-for-ML
items.description: An open-source dataset of synthetic power quality disturbances (PQD), ideal for training and validating machine learning models. Signals are generated using established mathematical models from scientific literature, with parameter ranges conforming to the IEEE 1159 standard. Includes a Python analysis framework for statistical exploration.

items.name: awesome-machine-learning
items.description: A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software.

items.name: Predictive-Maintenance-and-Simulation-Framework-for-Aircraft-Fleet-Operations
items.description: This project develops a predictive maintenance framework for aircraft turbofan engines using NASA's C-MAPSS dataset. It combines machine learning (LightGBM) for Remaining Useful Life (RUL) prediction with discrete-event simulation (SimPy) to model the impact of maintenance queue delays on engine fleet health.

items.name: Python-for-Machine-Learning-A-Frameworks-Libraries-Guide
items.description: This repository provides a practical exploration of the essential Python frameworks and libraries for Machine Learning. It includes curated examples, code snippets, and mini-projects to demonstrate the power and application of tools like Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch, Numpy, Pandas, Seaborn, Matplotlib..

items.name: credit_risk_default_prediction
items.description: A modular machine learning pipeline to predict the Probability of Default for loan applicants. Uses a "Champion-Challenger" framework to evaluate and compare multiple statistical and machine learning models (including regulatory explainability).

items.name: house-price-app
items.description: This project is a machine learning-based web application that predicts house prices based on various input features. The model is built using Linear Regression and deployed using a web framework to provide real-time predictions.

items.name: INNOVATIONS-IN-STROKE-IDENTIFICATION-A-MACHINE-LEARNING-BASED-DIAGNOSTIC-MODEL-USING-NEUROIMAGES
items.description: A machine learning framework designed to enhance the speed and accuracy of stroke identification. This model leverages deep learning architectures to analyze neuroimaging data (MRI/CT), assisting in the rapid diagnosis and classification of ischemic and hemorrhagic strokes.

items.description: A machine learning framework for Rust, inspired by mlr3

items.name: A-Data-Driven-Framework-For-Optimized-Inverstment-Decision-Making
items.description: Machine learning–based framework for analyzing financial datasets and generating data-driven investment recommendations across multiple domains.

items.name: Projeto-Ataques-de-Inferencia-Machine-Learning
items.description: Framework experimental para analisar o trade-off entre Privacidade Diferencial, utilidade dos dados e risco de vazamento. Avalia o impacto de diferentes valores de ε usando modelos simples de ML e ataques de inferência. Consome datasets já privatizados por pipeline externo.

items.name: scene-tokens
items.description: A Machine Learning framework for discovering and characterizing scenarios from trajectory datasets into different interaction types by combining state-of-the-art trajectory forecasting and embedding quantization techniques.

items.name: tyr
items.description: A dependently-typed machine learning framework for Lean 4, providing compile-time tensor shape verification.

items.description: "This project investigates how study behavior patterns and cognitive load indicators influence academic performance and proposes a machine learning-based framework to generate intelligent, personalized learning recommendations."

items.name: brain-stroke-prediction
items.description: A machine learning framework to predict brain stroke risk using demographic, medical, and lifestyle data from patient records. The pipeline features robust data preprocessing to handle class imbalance and evaluates five supervised classification models to identify key health predictors.

items.description: Built a machine learning framework using Python (NumPy, OpenCV, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow/Keras) to classify histopathological images using HOG features and Dragonfly Algorithm for feature optimization with a custom Neural Network classifier.

items.name: almos
items.description: ALMOS is an automated machine learning framework for chemical discovery, combining clustering, descriptor generation, and active learning into reproducible workflows accessible via CLI or GUI.

items.name: MultiScaleArrays.jl
items.description: A framework for developing multi-scale arrays for use in scientific machine learning (SciML) simulations

items.description: A Real-Time Geospatial Framework for Seismic Monitoring and Building Damage Prediction using Machine Learning

items.description: Machine learning framework for discovering chronobiological gene signatures in myopia

items.name: AI2026
items.description: An end-to-end technical repository featuring hands-on notebooks across the full AI stack: Statistics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, GenAI, and Agentic frameworks. Focused on 2026 industry standards, this collection bridges the gap between fundamental revision and experimental AI development.

items.name: autoware-ml
items.description: Autoware-ML is a machine learning framework for multiple tasks, supporting the full lifecycle - training, evaluation, optimization, and deployment of models with native runtime support in Autoware.

items.name: RZSM-Loess-Plateau
items.description: Code and data for A Machine Learning Framework for Estimating Multi-Layer Root Zone Soil Moisture on the Loess Plateau Using Bias-Corrected ERA5-Land Reanalysis Data

items.name: Fuel-Market-Time-Series-Analysis-Regime-Detection-Price-Prediction
items.description: An analysis framework for detecting market regime shifts in global energy commodities sector (2000–2024). This project applies advanced statistical methods and machine learning to uncover hidden patterns in crude oil, Brent crude, natural gas, heating oil, and RBOB gasoline prices, with practical applications for risk management and forecasting.

items.name: battery-assessment-and-RUL
items.description: This project presents a machine learning framework to estimate battery health and Remaining Useful Life (RUL) in devices like laptops and smartphones. Using user inputs, data preprocessing, and regression models, it predicts degradation trends and generates reports with maintenance insights and alerts

items.name: PhaseForge
items.description: PhaseForge is a framework for high-throughput alloy phase diagram prediction using machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) integrated with ATAT and CALPHAD modeling. Includes tools for structure relaxation, molecular dynamics, and TDB generation.

items.name: AD-Microbiome-ML-Classification
items.description: This project proposes a computational, data-driven diagnostic framework for Alzheimer’s disease (AD) by integrating microbiome-derived genome-scale metabolic models (GEMs) and machine learning to accurately predict disease stages from gut microbial activity.

items.name: Realtime-weather-forecasting
items.description: Machine Learning Framework for Real-Time Weather Forecasting and Destination Recommendation

items.name: Financial-Risk-Analysis-and-Modeling
items.description: This project is a comprehensive framework for credit risk analysis, designed to predict loan defaults and quantify potential losses for a lending portfolio. It utilizes a machine learning approach to build predictive models for key risk components, providing a data-driven solution for risk management.

items.name: VoltAI-Battery-Health-Prediction
items.description: Machine learning framework for EV battery SoH and RUL prediction
